case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. JOHN P. MIKULAK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF DECL IN SUPPORT OF PET TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; PET TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-16-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKULAK, JOHN P. $18,856.83 PRINCIPAL, $1,472.38 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, $36.30 MOTION FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,666.01, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO ARGUMENT AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED.ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY; REPORTER BELDON YEE #2647
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MIKULAK, JOHN P.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MIKULAK, JOHN P.
